hero.headline: Know your ballot in five minutes
hero.tagline: Your elections, your polling place, and every race explained — clearly, evenhandedly, and free.

how.title: How Groma works
how.step1Body: Enter your address and we pull your exact elections, races, and polling places from official election data.
how.step2Body: Clearly-labeled AI summaries explain each office and introduce every candidate evenhandedly — never who to pick.
how.step3Body: Choose your day, time, and route. Get a calendar reminder and a checklist so nothing surprises you.

masthead.confirmNote: Polls and deadlines vary by locality — confirm with your election office.

results.pledgeBanner: {{count}} people in {{zip}} have made a voting plan on Groma.
results.emptyDefault: No upcoming elections found for that address.
results.emptyNote: Election data comes from official sources and covers supported upcoming elections — your local election office always has the fullest picture.

race.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated summary — the official ballot language governs. Verify with official sources.
race.aiContextDisclaimer: AI-generated context · as of {{date}} — the official ballot language governs. Verify with official sources.

plan.title: Make a plan to vote
plan.intro: Voters who decide when and how they'll vote are far more likely to follow through. Three quick questions and you'll have a concrete plan.
plan.inProgress: You're partway through your voting plan.
plan.whatTime: What time of day works best?
plan.invite: Invite friends to make a plan
plan.invited: Copied! Send it to a friend
plan.inviteNote: People who plan to vote with friends are more likely to follow through.
plan.keepNote: Your plan lives on this page only — download the calendar file or pledge card to keep it.
plan.checkID: Bring ID just in case — {{state}} rules vary.
plan.checkIDNoState: Bring ID just in case — rules vary by state.
plan.photoIDRequired: Bring photo ID — {{state}} requires it for most in-person voters.
plan.checkRegistration: Confirm your voter registration is current.
plan.doubleCheck: Double-check hours with your local election office before you go.
plan.tipWalk: Leave a few minutes early — lines are shortest mid-morning.
plan.tipDrive: Scope out parking near your polling place ahead of time.
plan.tipTransit: Check your route and schedule the night before.
plan.pledgeText: I have a voting plan 🗳️ {{election}} — {{date}}, {{window}}{{city}}. Make yours in 2 minutes with Groma.
plan.inviteText: I just made my voting plan for {{election}} — takes 2 minutes: {{url}}

footer.blurb: Groma is a nonpartisan tool that helps you understand your ballot and make a plan to vote. Named for the Roman surveying instrument used to map and lay out cities — Groma maps your civic landscape.
footer.legal: Groma is not affiliated with any government agency, party, or campaign. AI-generated content is clearly labeled and can contain mistakes — the official ballot language always governs. Always confirm details with your local election office.
